params.description: Vertical data table titled Favorite Lunch Foods appears. Categories: Pizza (20), Tacos (30), Salad (15), Pasta (25), Sandwiches (15).

Vertical bar graph titled Favorite Lunch Foods appears in building mode. Y-axis ranges 0 to 35 in intervals of 5. Categories: Pizza, Tacos, Salad, Pasta, Sandwiches. Pre-filled bars: Pizza at 20, Tacos at 30, Sandwiches at 15. Empty bars: Salad, Pasta.

beats.text: Finish the graph. Salad has 15, Pasta has 25. Set the heights for Salad and Pasta.
Set the heights for Salad and Pasta.

validator.description: Student set Salad to 15 and Pasta to 25, both correct

params.description: Horizontal guideline draws from top of Salad bar to axis at 15, then from top of Pasta bar to axis at 25.

beats.text: You built the bar graph. Each bar shows exactly how many votes that food got.

elements.description: Vertical data table showing Favorite Lunch Foods values: Pizza 20, Tacos 30, Salad 15, Pasta 25, Sandwiches 15.

Vertical bar graph in building mode titled Favorite Lunch Foods. Y-axis ranges 0–35 in intervals of 5. All five bars filled: Pizza 20, Tacos 30, Salad 15, Pasta 25, Sandwiches 15. Guidelines drawn to confirm Salad and Pasta heights.
